description: Capture an approved order including card payments with 3D Secure results

three_d_secure.authentication_status: Y (success), N (fail), A (attempted), U (unable), R (rejected), C (challenge)

liability_shift.POSSIBLE: 3D Secure was available but not completed — limited protection
liability_shift.YES: Liability shifted to card issuer — chargeback protection for merchant
liability_shift.NO: No liability shift — merchant bears chargeback risk
liability_shift.UNKNOWN: Unable to determine — treat as NO

post_capture_actions.store_capture_id: Persist capture ID for refund operations
post_capture_actions.log_3ds_result: Log 3D Secure enrollment and authentication status for debugging

important_notes: Card captures may include 3D Secure authentication results
Always check liability_shift for fraud protection decisions
Capture ID is needed for POST /v2/payments/captures/{id}/refund
Some card payments may have PENDING status requiring webhook confirmation
